articles.content: The unveiling of Square Enix's Final Fantasy VII Revelation was easily among the top announcements of the whole Summer Game Fest 2026 week, especially for fans of the remake trilogy who had been wait… [+2114 chars]

articles.author: Ryan McCaffrey
articles.title: Fable Let Me Choose Whether a Talking Pig Should Live or Become Lunch | IGN Preview - IGN
articles.description: After a 30-minute demo of Fable's life-sim elements specifically, I'm pretty sold on its "game within a game," which was an important part of what made the original trilogy unique and special and is, thus, important for this Fable to get right.
articles.content: Out of everything under Microsoft's now-massive, multi-publisher umbrella, there is no game I'm more excited for than Fable. I adored the original trilogy (especially Fable 2), and, um, we'll just pr… [+7806 chars]
